## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss legal needs for rapidly growing AI-powered content creation startup considering entity conversion and VC funding.](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [fwd.digital grew from side hustle to $2M ARR in 5 months, now needs legal support for contracts, entity structure, and potential fundraising](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Current Wyoming LLC structure limits equity options; conversion to C-Corp recommended for flexibility and potential tax benefits](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Immediate priorities: strengthen contracts, properly classify workers, and protect IP as company scales with high-profile clients](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Topics

### Company Background and Growth

  - [Started as side project, grew to 21 clients and 15 employees in 5 months](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [$2M annual revenue, clients include Reddit, Ramp, and other prominent tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Provides AI-powered content creation services, building internal tech to enable "software as service margins"](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)

### Entity Structure Considerations

  - [Currently Wyoming LLC registered in California](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)
  - [Potential conversion to C-Corp discussed:](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
      - [Enables Qualified Small Business Stock (QSBS) tax benefits](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
      - [Easier to raise VC funding if needed](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
      - [More flexible equity options for attracting talent](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)
  - [Profits interest in LLC suggested as interim option for CTO equity](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=598.0)

### Legal Priorities and Risks

  - [Strengthen client contracts to mitigate risks associated with AI-generated content (e.g., copyright infringement, defamation)](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Properly classify and contract workers (currently have contractors in 11 countries)](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Protect IP and prevent staff from competing/poaching clients](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Ensure compliance when publishing regulated content (e.g., legal information)](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)

### Funding and Future Plans

  - [Currently profitable, hesitant about VC funding due to potential loss of control](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [Considering raising capital to attract talent and accelerate growth](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Building technology to transition from services to SaaS model long-term](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Albert to provide a reference from a FinTech client CEO](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Albert to send email outlining administrative next steps and required information](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Marcel to prepare detailed business description and service overview for Albert](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [Discuss staging of work and prioritization of legal tasks (contracts, worker classification, entity conversion)](https://fathom.video/share/t98uDwPMgiixiLRfNwUo88WgzaXyN7zV?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
